name: aihot
description: AI HOT daily briefing expert: curated AI models, products, industry news and papers, auto-formatted as a Chinese briefing, no API key needed.

displayDescription.en: One-line access to today's curated AI news — models, products, industry, papers, auto-formatted as a Chinese briefing, no API key needed.
displayDescription.zh: 一句话查到每天精选的 AI 模型/产品/行业/论文动态，自动整理成中文简报，免配置免登录。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 今天 AI 圈有什么新动态？

quickPrompts.zh: 今天 AI 圈有什么新动态？

quickPrompts.en: Show me the latest AI daily report
quickPrompts.zh: 看一下最新的 AI 日报
